zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridget Allgar於大約1562年3月出生在英國艾可沙爾福德時，她的父親William Allgar33歲，母親Margaret31歲。她於1585年6月24日與Robert White of Messing在英國艾可沙爾福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1623年6月9日之後在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridget Allgar于大约1562年3月出生在英国艾可沙爾福德时，她的父亲William Allgar33岁，母亲Margaret31岁。她于1585年6月24日与Robert White of Messing在英国艾可沙爾福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1623年6月9日之后在她的家乡，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德。

nameMeanings.name: Allgar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Algar
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Algar, representing the falling together of two Old English names, Ælfgār and Æthelgār, composed of the elements respectively ælf ‘elf’ or æthel ‘noble’ + gār ‘spear’. It could also be from the much rarer Old English personal name Ealdgār, composed of elements meaning ‘old’ + ‘spear’. In East Anglia, it is more probably a variant of Alger (Old Norse Álfgeirr). See also Agar , Elgar .

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget Allgar was born about March 1562, in Shalford, Essex, England, her father, William Allgar, was 33 and her mother, Margaret, was 31. She married Robert White of Messing on 24 June 1585, in Shalford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 9 June 1623, in her hometown, and was buried in Shalford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget Allgar est née environ mars 1562, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Allgar, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert White of Messing le 24 juin 1585, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 9 juin 1623, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bridget Allgar um März 1562 in Shalford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Allgar 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret 31. Sie hat am 24. Juni 1585 in Shalford, Essex, England Robert White of Messing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 9. Juni 1623 in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Shalford, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Allgar è nata il circa marzo 1562 nel Shalford, Essex, England, sua padre, William Allgar, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margaret, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Robert White of Messing il 24 giugno 1585, nel Shalford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 9 giugno 1623, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Shalford, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Bridget Allgarが約1562年3月にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードで生まれた時，父William Allgarは33歳，母Margaretは31歳であった。1585年6月24日にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードでRobert White of Messingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1623年6月9日以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスエセックスシャルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget Allgar(이)가 대략 1562년 3월 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Allgar(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1585년 6월 24일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 Robert White of Messing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1623년 6월 9일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.about March 1562–after 9 June 1623: aproximadamente março de 1562–após 9 de junho de 1623
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Allgar nasceu aproximadamente março de 1562, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Allgar, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert White of Messing em 24 de junho de 1585, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 9 de junho de 1623, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget Allgar родилась около марта 1562 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William Allgar было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert White of Messing 24 июня 1585 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 9 июнь 1623 г. в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Robert White of Messing el 24 de junio de 1585, en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 9 de junio de 1623, en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.
